The policy validation implementation in `runtime/policy_validator.py` requires policy JSON, SHA256, signature, and public key artifacts. It is documented to fail closed on missing artifacts, parse issues, digest mismatch, or signature failu

- "USBAY Universal Execution Architecture" is assumed to correspond to the repository execution path in `gateway/app.py`, `runtime/enforcement_gateway.py`, `runtime/policy_validator.py`, and related security/audit modules.
- `runtime/policy_validator.py` validates policy integrity and fails closed on missing or invalid policy artifacts.
- Repository execution architecture is assumed to map to `gateway/app.py`, `runtime/enforcement_gateway.py`, `runtime/policy_validator.py`, Hydra security modules, and audit modules.
- `runtime/policy_validator.py` validates policy JSON, SHA256 digest, signature, and public key artifacts.
